title: VehiclePosition
description: The current real-time geographic position, bearing, and speed of a vehicle operating a transport service.

tripDescriptor.description: Identifies the trip this vehicle is operating

latitude.description: Current latitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees

longitude.description: Current longitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees

speed.description: Current speed in metres per second

currentStopSequence.description: Stop sequence index of the stop the vehicle is at or approaching

currentStatus.description: Vehicle status relative to the stop (INCOMING_AT, STOPPED_AT, IN_TRANSIT_TO)

id.description: Unique identifier for the tracking record

url.description: URL endpoint for real-time tracking information

validity.description: Validity period for this tracking record
